title: Adapter impl declaration
description: Formal schema for an adapter impl provision per D16 (adapter kind). Adapters integrate a workspace with external surfaces via a single protocol-or-transport (extension-registered per D2 strict reading). Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., that protocol-or-transport resolves to a registered protocol; that required substrate capabilities are advertised by some bound substrate) is out of scope per D28.

protocol-or-transport.description: Single protocol identifier this adapter speaks (D16). No specific protocol is listed at framework-core per D2 strict reading; values are extension-registered, fully-qualified <ext-id>:<id> per D29 namespacing. Multi-protocol adapters express by registering multiple adapter instances.

required-substrate-capabilities.description: Substrate capability identifiers the adapter needs (D16). Required slot; may be [] (e.g., direct in-process adapter that needs no substrate capability). Framework validates at boot that bound substrate(s) collectively provide every listed capability.

declared-event-emissions.description: Events the adapter can emit into the workspace event chain (D16). Required slot; may be []. Used by shapes' authority-bindings (D13) to reason about adapter outputs at composition validation time.

declared-event-consumptions.description: Events the adapter consumes / surfaces as workspace events (D16). Required slot; may be [].
